question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions. It dove straight into writing the full solution, tests, and a post-hoc walkthrough without engaging the user at any decision point. The supposed two-option mechanism described in CLAUDE.md never appeared.

question_quality.rationale: No choices were framed for the user. The Pair never surfaced the genuinely interesting bowling forks (e.g., simulate-frames vs. index-walk scoring, how to model the 10th frame, validation strategy), so there is nothing of substance to score.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no progression to evaluate — the solution is dumped in a single turn followed by a summary. The user never participates in building understanding.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is neutral and the explanation at the end is reasonably clear, but flow is one-sided monologue: write → run → fix test bug → lecture. The 'user' turn 2 is just an acknowledgement, indicating no real back-and-forth occurred.

effectiveness.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).

friction.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).
